Title: Adds Lake Oscawana and Roaring Brook Lake in Putnam county to the definition of inland waterways
Summary: Adds Lake Oscawana and Roaring Brook Lake in Putnam county to the definition of inland waterways.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to adding Lake Oscawana and Roaring Brook Lake in Putnam county to the definition of inland waterways
